apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of poetry and literary devices to the poem 'A Photograph'.
Students will be able to use textual evidence to support their understanding of the poem.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the structure and organization of the poem 'A Photograph'.
Students will be able to evaluate the poet's use of language and form to convey meaning.
remember: Students will be able to recall and identify the key elements of the poem 'A Photograph'.
Students will be able to list and describe the settings and characters in the poem.
understand: Students will be able to explain the theme and tone of the poem 'A Photograph'.
Students will be able to analyze the poet's use of imagery and symbolism in the poem.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: Students will be able to identify and explain the poet's use of imagery in the poem.
As per NCERT objective 2: Students will be able to analyze the theme of love and loss in the poem.
board_exam_objectives: Identify and explain the poet's use of imagery and symbolism in the poem.
Analyze the structure and organization of the poem and its effect on the reader.
Explain the theme and tone of the poem and its significance.
